summary: MASTER FORENSIC AUDIT — Complete discovery of BIQc ecosystem. Tested System 1 (Marketing Website), System 2 (Authenticated Platform), System 3 (Mobile App code review), Design System, and Component Library. Login works with andretest@test.com/Kooksmou1979*. All 25+ dashboard pages accessible. KEY NEW FINDING: /data-center shows 'Failed to load data center' toast (backend 503 transient). Trust sub-pages (/trust/terms, /trust/privacy etc.) load but return no h1/h2 headings. Homepage FCP: 304ms, very fast. Prior issues from iteration_107 (forensic audit timeout, exposure scan timeout) still present. /api/user/integration-status now returns 200 OK (previously 500).

performance.notes: Excellent FCP. React app loads fast from CDN cache.

critical.issue: Does not respond within 30s (default apiClient timeout). ForensicAuditPage falls back to /ingestion/run which also times out. Total ~60s spin before error shown. PERSISTING FROM ITERATION_107.
Does not respond within 90s (DSEEPage explicit timeout: 90000ms). User sees 90s spinner before error. PERSISTING FROM ITERATION_107.

minor.issue: Both returned HTTP 503 during DataCenter page test — causing 'Failed to load data center' toast. May be transient backend restart/cold start issue. Page renders with 0/default values.
Shows 403 Forbidden intermittently in backend logs (alongside 200 OK responses). Was 500 in iteration_107, now intermittent 403.

ui_bugs.issue: No h1/h2 heading elements detected by DOM query. Content loads but uses non-standard heading tags or styled divs. SEO impact.
No visible error text detected after 5s wait with invalid credentials. Error may be Sonner toast that disappears quickly. UNVERIFIED.

integration_issues.issue: Promise.all([/data-center/files, /data-center/stats, /business-profile]) fails when backend returns 503. Shows 'Failed to load data center' toast. Page still renders with default empty values (0/0MB). Need backend reliability fix.
affected_selectors: [data-testid not assigned to DataCenter stats cards]

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix /api/ingestion/hybrid and /api/ingestion/run endpoints — Forensic Audit still timing out after 60s. Persistent from iteration_107.
CRITICAL: Fix /api/dsee/scan endpoint — Exposure Scan still timing out after 90s. Persistent from iteration_107.
HIGH: Investigate /data-center 503 errors on /api/data-center/files and /api/business-profile. Likely cold-start or transient issue. Add retry logic in DataCenter.js or improve backend reliability.
MEDIUM: Investigate /api/user/integration-status returning 403 intermittently (seen in backend logs alongside 200 OK responses).
LOW: Add h1/h2 tags to trust sub-pages (/trust/terms, /trust/privacy, /trust/security, /trust/dpa, /trust/centre) for SEO.
LOW: Verify invalid login error display — test with Sonner toast or inline error message.
critical_code_review_comments: DataCenter.js: Promise.all with 3 API calls — if any one fails, all data lost. Consider Promise.allSettled for better resilience and partial data display.
ForensicAuditPage.js: No explicit timeout → uses 30s default × 2 = 60s. Still unresolved from iteration_107.
DSEEPage.js: 90s explicit timeout still in place — reduce to 45s minimum.
Trust sub-pages: No h1/h2 elements — SEO gap and accessibility concern.

success_rate.frontend: 92% (28/30 pages fully functional, 1 error toast on data-center, 2 pages with long timeout spinners)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive discovery audit complete. All 25+ authenticated routes documented with empty states. All System 1 marketing pages documented. System 3 mobile app fully documented via code review. Persistent issues: Forensic Audit (60s timeout) and Exposure Scan (90s timeout) still broken. Data Center shows transient 503 toast. Trust sub-pages lack h1/h2 headings. Test account: andretest@test.com / Kooksmou1979* works. Sidebar has 5 sections + BIQc Legal collapsible. Mobile bottom nav has 5 items + More sheet with 6 items.

data_center_failed_toast.symptom: Toast: 'Failed to load data center' on page load
data_center_failed_toast.root_cause: DataCenter.js uses Promise.all([/data-center/files, /data-center/stats, /business-profile]). If ANY returns 503, catch block fires toast and no data is set. Backend returned 503 (transient) during test run.
data_center_failed_toast.code_fix: Replace Promise.all with Promise.allSettled in DataCenter.js fetchData() to show partial data even if one API fails.
data_center_failed_toast.backend_fix: Investigate why /api/data-center/files and /api/business-profile return 503 — check cold start issues.

forensic_audit_timeout.symptom: Run Audit button spins for ~60s before error
forensic_audit_timeout.root_cause: Backend /api/ingestion/hybrid not responding within 30s. Falls back to /ingestion/run which also times out.

exposure_scan_timeout.symptom: Scan button spins for 90s before error
exposure_scan_timeout.root_cause: Backend /api/dsee/scan has 90s timeout. Not responding in time.
